generated_oml:
instance Ds18s20TemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer with 64-bit serial code, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance Ds18s20TemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer with 64-bit serial code, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance Ds18s20TemperatureSensor3 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer with 64-bit serial code, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Ds18s20TemperatureSensor1, Ds18s20TemperatureSensor2, Ds18s20TemperatureSensor3
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature measurements from DS18S20 sensors used for model training and validation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationEnabler
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed (214×214×3 mm) controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers on PCB for temperature regulation"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan (0.02 m³/s airflow) controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers on PCB for airflow management"
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ volume"
]

instance PcbWithMOSFETs : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for heatbed and fan"
]

instance RaspberryPi4Controller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for system management"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system comprising styrofoam container, heatbed, fan, temperature sensors, Raspberry Pi controller, PCB, and power supply"
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, Heatbed, Fan, Ds18s20TemperatureSensor1, Ds18s20TemperatureSensor2, Ds18s20TemperatureSensor3, RaspberryPi4Controller, PcbWithMOSFETs, PowerSupply
]

instance RabbitMQMessageBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for transmitting temperature data from physical sensors to Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationModelA, SimulationModelB, CalibrationAlgorithm, SafetyMonitoring, StateEstimation
]

instance ScipyOptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy optimization package for non-linear least squares calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationAlgorithm, SimulationModelA, SimulationModelB
]

instance OneWireBusProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire bus protocol for sensor communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables Ds18s20TemperatureSensor1, Ds18s20TemperatureSensor2, Ds18s20TemperatureSensor3
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub for open-source code repository"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationAlgorithm, SimulationModelA, SimulationModelB
]

instance RaspberryPi4ControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for managing GPIO signals to heatbed and fan"
    DTDFVocab:enables HeatbedControlAction, FanControlAction
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with 2 parameters for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationEnabler
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with 4 parameters for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationEnabler
]

instance SimulationModelA : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation model for temperature prediction using 2 parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationDecision
]

instance SimulationModelB : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation model for temperature prediction using 4 parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationDecision
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm for parameter optimization using non-linear least squares"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdate
]

instance SafetyMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Safety monitoring for thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringAlert, HeatbedControlAction, FanControlAction
]

instance StateEstimation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation for optimal and safe operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateInsight
]

instance SafetyMonitoringAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts generated from safety monitoring to ensure safe operation"
]

instance OptimizationDecision : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimization decisions based on model predictions for temperature control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ParameterUpdate : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Parameter updates derived from calibration processes"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SystemStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated system state for optimal operation"
]

instance HeatbedControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control action for heatbed current regulation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FanControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control action for fan airflow management"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heating on/off, fan speed) generated by the Digital Twin controller are sent through RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which actuates the heatbed and fan via MOSFETs."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of RabbitMQ communication server, Raspberry Pi-based controller, low-level driver, and simulation models to enable real-time data exchange and control between physical and virtual components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, integrating models post-deployment for monitoring and prediction of current operating conditions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation via experimental comparison of model predictions against real-world data, residual error minimization using Scipy's optimization function, and testing assumptions (e.g., temperature uniformity)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ (AMQP protocol) for message-based communication between Physical Twin and Digital Twin components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin components hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, including RabbitMQ server, controller, and low-level driver."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol implemented in the low-level driver to maintain device safety during actuation."
]
